## Extracted Preview
> RUH.AI | CONSTRUCTION DIGITAL EMPLOYEES
> Proposal for Building a Horizontal AI 
> Solution
> for Construction Companies
> and a tailored buy-case for RPX Construction
> Prepared for strategic discussion on how Ruh.ai can become a construction workflow 
> automation layer that sells to multiple contractors and gives RPX a compelling reason to buy.
> Core thesis
> Do not build one-off niche agents for each client. Build one shared construction operations platform 
> with reusable digital employees, modular workflow packs, strong human approval controls, and deep 
> integration into the systems construction teams already use. Then position RPX as both an internal 
> buyer and a future white-label product partner.
> What Ruh.ai should build What makes it horizontal What RPX should buy
> A governed automation layer 
> for project admin, document 
> control, support, and 
> reporting.Shared core platform + 
> configurable digital employees 
> + workflow packs by firm and 
> role.An AI layer that improves RPX 
> sales, support, onboarding, 
> monitoring communication, 
> and product stickiness.
> Prepared March 7, 2026
> For internal business development use Ruh.ai proposal | Horizontal construction AI platform and RPX buy-case
> Prepared for strategic discussion1 Executive summary
> Construction companies do not primarily need another dashboard. They need work to get done. 
> The repeatable pain across the industry is not sensor-specific or trade-specific; it is the constant 
> burden of coordinating documents, chasing approvals, answering routine questions, preparing 
> reports, following up action items, and keeping teams aligned...
